title: Our Top 10 Picks For Dividend Growth Stocks - July 2023
text: This monthly series of articles focuses on DGI stocks that are likely to provide a high rate of dividend growth rather than a high current yield. We use our proprietary models to rate quantitatively and qualitatively and select the top ten names from an initial list of nearly 400 dividend stocks. A balanced portfolio should have a mix of high-dividend growth stocks and high-yield dividend stocks, depending on the life stage. If you are in the accumulation phase and are several years away from retirement, high-growth dividend stocks would be more appropriate for long-term growth.

title: Costco June sales edge higher, but same-store sales drop
text: Shares of Costco Wholesale Corp. COST dropped nearly 1% in the extended session Thursday after the retailer reported June sales of $22.86 billion, an increase of 0.4% from the $22.78 billion in June 2022. Comparable-store sales fell 1.4%, including a drop of 2.5% for U.S. same-store sales.

title: Costco Wholesale Corporation Reports June Sales Results
text: ISSAQUAH, Wash., July 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Costco Wholesale Corporation (“Costco” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: COST) today reported net sales of $22.86 billion for the retail month of June, the five weeks ended July 2, 2023, an increase of 0.4 percent from $22.78 billion last year.
